name: Westerveld (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the stripe across the central band

description: Three horizontal bands of green, yellow and blue, the yellow band crossed by a narrow black stripe.
history: Flag of the municipality of Westerveld in the west of the province of Drenthe, formed in the 1998 reorganisation of the province's municipalities.

features.role: green, yellow and blue bands with a narrow black stripe on the yellow
